text: Inside this sleek, modern space, I am aware of both the sterile calm and the latent potential for ideas to emerge. The glass and reflections feel almost philosophical, as though asking me to see myself within this environment. Moving closer to the R+D exhibit, I’m curious and a little excited—the design and screens draw me in, hinting at innovation and the endless interplay between human thought and technology. Among these displays, I sense both the comfort of structured knowledge and the thrilling uncertainty of what might be discovered next.
